Interface Saml2IdpContext

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
public interface Saml2IdpContext extends Serializable
A context that holds information of the Identity Provider runtime environment.
Author:
Martin Lindström

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Saml2ResponseAttributes
    getResponseAttributes()
    Gets the Saml2ResponseAttributes.
    IdentityProviderSettings
    getSettings()
    Gets the IdP settings (configuration)

    • getSettings

      IdentityProviderSettings getSettings()
      Gets the IdP settings (configuration)
      Returns:
      the IdP settings

    • getResponseAttributes

      Saml2ResponseAttributes getResponseAttributes()
      Gets the Saml2ResponseAttributes.
      Returns:
      the attributes needed to send response messages
